Container.Name: step-ui-ng
Container.Overview: Self-contained web UI for Smallstep Step-CA. Provides a modern server-rendered interface (Templ + htmx, no Node/React) to manage certificates, provisioners, users, and ACME. Built-in authentication with first-run super-admin setup; no external dependencies. Data (SQLite database + master encryption key) persists in the mapped /data volume — back it up and protect it. Talks to Step-CA via its HTTP/admin API (no step CLI required). Image tags: :latest (stable releases), :edge (latest beta builds).

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port the web UI listens on.

Config.Name: Data (DB + secret.key)
Config.Description: Persistent data directory. Contains the SQLite database and the master encryption key (secret.key). BACK THIS UP and restrict access — anyone with the contents can decrypt all stored secrets.

Config.Name: COOKIE_SECURE
Config.Description: Set to true when the UI is served over HTTPS (e.g. behind an Nginx/Caddy reverse proxy with TLS). Marks session and CSRF cookies as Secure so browsers only send them over encrypted connections.

Config.Name: RENEW_DEFAULT_DAYS
Config.Description: Default validity (in days) pre-filled in the certificate renewal form. Users can override this per renewal. The CA's provisioner maximum always takes precedence.
